author: anon-295fd0bb
content: Audit complete. SharedWriter already IS the HubWriter — it has issue_path(), issue_rel_path(), layout_version(), write_commit_push(). Remaining work: (1) add comment_rel_path() to centralize comment paths from mutations.rs, (2) add integrity layout check for mixed V1/V2, (3) add --repair flag that migrates V1→V2 and cleans stale files.
